title: Kadakkal Devi Temple
tagline: Kadakkal Devi Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kadakkal Devi Temple is situated at Kollam District, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Kadakkal Devi Temple is situated at Kollam District, Kerala, India. Kadakkal village is in the eastern part of Kollam District, Kerala. Kadakkal is well known for the social revolutionary activities held in the pre-independent period of India. Kadakkal is an agriculture village and it is known for its spice production.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kilimarathukavu Temple
topPlaces.description: Kilimarathukavu Shiva Parvathy Temple is a Hindu temple located in Kadakkal Kollam district, Kerala, India. The temple deities include the cult images of 'Dharma Shastha', and an epithet of Ayyappan is also present within the temple.

topPlaces.name: Kadakkal
topPlaces.description: Kadakkal is a historic city located in the eastern part of Kollam district, Kerala. It is 44 km away from both Kollam City and Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Thudayannoor
topPlaces.description: Thudayannoor is a village located in Ittiva Grama Panchayath in the eastern part of Kollam district, Kerala state, India. It is 2 km away from Oil Pam India Ltd (plantation), 57 km from Trivandrum and 42 km from Kollam town.

topPlaces.name: Ittiva
topPlaces.description: Ittiva is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Mannoor, Kollam
topPlaces.description: Mannoor is a village in Ittiva Grama Panchayath located towards the west of Kollam district of Kerala, India. It is located on the west of the Main Central Road.

topPlaces.name: Kummil
topPlaces.description: Kummil is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kottukkal
topPlaces.description: Kottukkal is a village in Kollam district of Kerala, India. The historical importance of the village is linked to Kottukal cave temple, built before 800 CE. The village comes under Ittiva panchayath and it is the most prominent town in this panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Channappetta
topPlaces.description: Channappetta is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kadakkal Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kadakkal Devi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kadakkal Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (39 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (39 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kadakkal Devi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kadakkal Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kadakkal Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kadakkal Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kadakkal Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kilimarathukavu Temple, Kadakkal, Thudayannoor, Ittiva, Mannoor, Kollam.
